note: P0-2 cost & slippage stress scenarios (docs/ML_PROD_READINESS_PLAN.md). Baseline promotion cost model is zero commission + 5 bps slippage per side (GlobalEquityEngine US path); each scenario ADDS the costs below on top of that base. slippage_bps values are per side; thin names (IONQ, APLD) carry 2x the SPY haircut per the plan.

scenarios.description: 2x the nominal 0.001 commission: 0.002 notional charged per fill (entry and exit).
0.002 per-side commission plus per-symbol spread haircut; thin names 2x SPY (per side).
